name: looply-tui
description: Looply TUI — visor de terminal read-only en vivo (OpenTUI)

scripts.install-cmd: mkdir -p "$HOME/.local/bin" && rm -f "$HOME/.local/bin/looply" && printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash\nexec bun %s/src/index.tsx "$@"\n' "$PWD" > "$HOME/.local/bin/looply" && chmod +x "$HOME/.local/bin/looply" && echo 'looply (OpenTUI/Bun) instalado en ~/.local/bin/looply'
